description:
# Traceability Enrichment

Final enrichment: persist LE session rule logs, restore PR tracking state on restart, and ensure full bidirectional tracing from any artifact back to its source.

## Phases
1. Persist LE session ruleLog snapshots
2. Restore PR tracking state on server restart
3. Bidirectional traceability verification test
title: [Epic] Traceability Enrichment
